title: Floating Vaulting Updraft handoff: commits and main merge complete
body: Session close: committed strict substrate local instance at 47028fc3, committed fitness response discipline at dc04d80b, merged origin/main cleanly at bf3211ac, and closed commit-window claim DE25B6D0-8C4C-4D53-B4F4-9BC54C4D4AC9. Next session should run Phase 4/5 review/closure on the strict local instance, then start doctor Phase 0 against the manifest/schema and migration ledger; repo-level doctor commands must use built agent-tools output only.
